name: ExtensionExpression_Name
title: R5: name additional types
description: R5: `Expression.name` additional types (code) additional types from child elements (value)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Expression.name` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Expression.name` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Expression.name` 0..1 `code`
*  R4B: `Expression.name` 0..1 `id`
*  R4: `Expression.name` 0..1 `id`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Expression.name` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.name` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types: code.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.

element.definition: R5: `Expression.name` additional types (code) additional types from child elements (value)

element.short: Short name assigned to expression for reuse
element.definition: A short name assigned to the expression to allow for multiple reuse of the expression in the context where it is defined.
